name: intrinsicallysafeheadsets.com
description: Independent comparison of ATEX and IECEx certified intrinsically safe headsets, headphones, and earbuds for hazardous areas (Zone 0/1/2).

key_entities.name: Sensear SM1P-Ex
key_entities.description: Zone 1 over-ear headset with Bluetooth, two-way radio, and SENS speech enhancement. ATEX/IECEx/UL913 certified.

key_entities.name: Sensear SM1B-Ex
key_entities.description: Zone 1 battery-powered headset with two-way radio and SENS technology. ATEX/IECEx/UL913/CSA certified.

key_entities.name: 3M Peltor WS LiteCom PRO III Ex
key_entities.description: Zone 0 headset with built-in PMR446/UHF two-way radio. ATEX and IECEx certified. 14-hour battery.

key_entities.name: ecom Ex-TRA 30
key_entities.description: Zone 2 wired headset for ATEX-certified radios. No battery required. Most affordable ATEX headset option.

related_sites.name: intrinsicallysafephones.com
related_sites.description: ATEX and IECEx certified phone comparison — including Xshielder iPhone Ex cases for Zone 1.

related_sites.name: explosionprooftablets.com
related_sites.description: ATEX and IECEx certified tablet comparison for hazardous areas.

content_files.title: What Is an Intrinsically Safe Headset?
